testimonials.client: VE Commercial Vehicles Ltd. (Volvo Group–Eicher Motors JV)
testimonials.quote: The team of experts did an excellent job through their systematic and meticulous approach, and could successfully pinpoint potential energy saving opportunities in our plant. We look forward to our continued long-term relationship for achieving our common endeavour of energy conservation.

A detailed energy assessment covering all electrical and thermal energy-consuming areas — boilers and steam systems, chilled water, solar PV, compressed air — through exhaustive surveys, real-time measurements and analysis.
The work covered all electrical and thermal energy-consuming areas of the facility through exhaustive data collection, surveys, real-time measurements and analysis.
The team did an excellent job through their systematic and meticulous approach, and could successfully pinpoint potential energy saving opportunities in our plant.
